title: Easy Aether
description: Bring yourself into the Aether with Easy Blocks resourcepack! + Vanilla friendly add-ons!
body:
This modpack includes The Aether mod and Lost Aether content as well. Alongside some Vanilla+ additions like structures and biomes.
If you want to have a taste of Aether and Vanilla+ at the same time, this could be the perfect modpack for you!

Voice Chat mod is also included, so **please check your keybinds before start playing**.

========================================================================

Resourcepack made by 1kick234too.

https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/1kick234too/

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/easy-blocks-1-15/

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/easy-blocks-aether-1-20/

========================================================================
